title: The WIPO Academy Portfolio: Global IP Education, Training and Skills Development 2026
content: This Portfolio serves as a catalogue of all the training opportunities to be offered by the WIPO Academy in 2026 and outlines the content of each course.

sourceDescription: The WIPO RSS newsfeed provides access to the digital versions of our publications, studies and information products.
